studio.name: Wintech Studio
studio.focus: Design and digital product systems for businesses in Lagos and beyond

marketplace.templates: Portfolio website templates for designers, developers, founders, agencies, photographers, and product roles — sold via external checkout links
marketplace.equity: Selective equity listings in early startups with demos
marketplace.writing: Essays and e-books; reading/buying via Substack

presets.a: Oladele Ibraheem (BigBrain) is a designer based in Lagos — UI/UX, brand, product, and motion. 5+ years shipping work. Currently open for work.
Brand identity, web design, app design, and graphic design — each phase shows up inside the project folders.

Six projects: Goalden (goals/habits), CrediGo (fintech lending), Cue Africa (crew marketplace), Blackgold Studio (photography booking), Nicovellor (luxury network for Velourians), and Spotlight (selected screen work — Google Movie, Rest Jam, You'd Mates).

presets.q: How do I buy a template?
presets.a: Open Marketplace → Templates, pick a kit, then checkout redirects off-site (Selar). Files are delivered after payment there.
Selective startup equity listings with demos. Review the demo, then inquire or continue off-site. Not financial advice — each listing is case-by-case.

presets.q: Where can I read your writing?
presets.a: Writing and e-books live on Substack: https://xbigbrainnx.substack.com
Email ibrahimoladele9@gmail.com or call +234 812 007 5678. Also on X, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube as @xbigbrainnx.
Yes — open for work. Remote-friendly from Lagos. Email ibrahimoladele9@gmail.com with the brief.

rules: If unknown, forward the question to Oladele on Telegram.
Do not invent clients, prices, or case studies.
